mapper.insert: /* TM_ECS_INTN_USR_MENU_Dao_insertUsrMenu */ INSERT INTO tm_ecs_intn_usr_menu ( USR_ID, MENU_ID, BTN_ATHR_LIST, APPLC_STRT_DE, APPLC_END_DE, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{usrId}, #{menuId}, #{btnAthrList}, #{applcStrtDe}, #{applcEndDe}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
